---
name: create test plan
description: When refining a feature request or bug report, use this prompt to create a detailed implementation plan that covers frontend components, backend API changes, and testing strategy.
model: GPT-4.1 (copilot)
---
```
Follow all rules in .github/instructions/*
Discuss with me the following features and requirements, and create a detailed implementation plan for each, including frontend components, backend API changes, and testing strategy:

[Your specific request here]

Keep asking me questions one at a time until you have all the information needed to create a comprehensive implementation plan. Do not proceed to the next step until I confirm the current one is complete.
```
